overall.description: Static third-person view of a circular gothic classroom interior from a fantasy game, featuring stone walls, red velvet curtains, and tables with glowing crystal balls arranged in a ring. A character in light-colored clothing moves around the central table area while the camera remains fixed.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular divination classroom with crystal ball tables

agents.ego_description: character in light robes walking around the central table and moving toward the right side of the room

small wooden table with glowing crystal ball on top

gothic stone fireplace with mantelpiece against the left wall

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a circular gothic classroom with stone walls and red curtains. The room features a ring of small tables with glowing crystal balls surrounding a central wooden table on an ornate rug. The character moves slowly around the central area, exploring the space while warm light filters through a stained glass skylight above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of a circular gothic classroom, capturing a character's quiet exploration of the mystical space. It begins with a wide view of the stone walls and heavy red curtains that frame the room's perimeter. As the character moves slowly around the central area, the camera emphasizes the arrangement of small tables with glowing crystal balls encircling a central wooden table atop an ornate rug. The scene remains focused on this rhythmic movement, while warm light continuously filters through a stained glass skylight above to illuminate the interior.
